scripts.generate: bun ./bioinformatics-youbetterknow.ts --catalog data/catalog.json --output site/awesome-bioinformatics.md --json-output site/data/latest.json --history-output site/data/history.json --snapshot-dir site/data/snapshots
scripts.update: bun ./bioinformatics-youbetterknow.ts --discover --catalog data/catalog.json --output site/awesome-bioinformatics.md --json-output site/data/latest.json --history-output site/data/history.json --snapshot-dir site/data/snapshots
